THESORCERESSMOD-SLEIGHT.description: A Sleight's cost is equal to the number of Sleights you've played this turn.
THESORCERESSMOD-SLEIGHT.title: Sleight

THESORCERESSMOD-SHADOWDANCE.title: Shadowdance
THESORCERESSMOD-SUBTLE.description: If this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], play it for free.
THESORCERESSMOD-SUBTLE.title: Agile
